lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Good morning, what would you like?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: Well we have beer, or if you want some food, we have our home made stew and meat pies.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Could I have some stew please?

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: A bowl of stew, that'll be 20 coins please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Bartender
lines.text: One beer coming up. Ok, that'll be two coins.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. I don't seem to have enough money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't really want anything thanks.
